title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
summary: A YouTube video discussing Google DeepMind's "From AGI to ASI" paper, which argues that AGI may mark the beginning rather than the end of transformative AI progress. The video suggests that once human-level AI is replicated and optimized, the jump to superintelligence (ASI) could be the more significant milestone, with implications for how intelligence scales as an industrial process.
writeup: The video covers a Google DeepMind paper, "From AGI to ASI," and its central claim that AGI may be a starting point rather than an endpoint for transformative AI progress. The argument is that once human-level AI is replicated and optimized, the transition to artificial superintelligence (ASI) could be the more consequential milestone. Concepts discussed include AI agents and recursive self-improvement, framed around the idea of intelligence scaling as an industrial process.
